title: Lifting of a Closure Order. A verified Motion to Lift a Closure Order may
content: 46 be filed with the Office of the Undersecretary for Licensing and Adjudication within ten 47 (10) calendar days from the date of implementation thereof. 48 49 The lifting of a Closure Order is without prejudice to the filing of a criminal action. 50 51
